properties.description: Alerts when the KEV-Exceptions watchlist is created, updated, or has items modified. The watchlist suppresses CVE+device pairs from generating incidents - an attacker who can write to it can hide a backdoor permanently. All changes should match a documented change-control ticket.
properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationNameValue has_any (
    'MICROSOFT.OPERATIONALINSIGHTS/WORKSPACES/PROVIDERS/WATCHLISTS/WRITE',
    'MICROSOFT.OPERATIONALINSIGHTS/WORKSPACES/PROVIDERS/WATCHLISTS/WATCHLISTITEMS/WRITE',
    'MICROSOFT.OPERATIONALINSIGHTS/WORKSPACES/PROVIDERS/WATCHLISTS/WATCHLISTITEMS/DELETE',
    'MICROSOFT.OPERATIONALINSIGHTS/WORKSPACES/PROVIDERS/WATCHLISTS/DELETE'
)
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where _ResourceId has 'KEV-Exceptions' or tostring(parse_json(tostring(Properties)).resource) has 'KEV-Exceptions'
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, Caller, CallerIpAddress, ResourceGroup, _ResourceId, CorrelationId
| extend AccountName = tostring(split(Caller, '@')[0])
| extend AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(Caller, '@')[1])
